title: Chieti Cathedral
summary:
Chieti Cathedral (Italian: Duomo di Chieti; Cattedrale di San Giustino) is a Roman Catholic cathedral in Chieti (Abruzzo, Italy), dedicated to Saint Justin of Chieti (San Giustino). Formerly the episcopal seat of the Diocese of Chieti, it is now the seat of the Archbishops of Chieti-Vasto.
The cathedral was constructed in the 9th century and rebuilt in the 13th.

The cathedral was constructed in the 9th century and rebuilt in the 13th.
